step_1_image_prompt: An overhead flat-lay shot on a polished white marble surface with subtle grey veining. Around the central area: a small ceramic dish of dried rose petals at the upper-left of the composition, a clear glass tumbler of water at the upper-right with subtle condensation, a thin gold chain necklace coiled gracefully at the lower-left, and a single sprig of dried lavender at the lower-right. The center of the composition is intentionally empty — clean marble surface with generous negative space, perfectly framed by the surrounding items in a balanced symmetric arrangement. Soft even natural daylight from above, very gentle diffuse shadows cast outward from each object, bright clean wash across the marble, subtle warm undertone in the highlights. Shot on Sony A7IV 50mm lens directly overhead. Real photograph, not AI-generated, candid moment. Real surface texture and grain on the marble, editorial product feature premium hero mood, palette of white marble, soft pink dried rose, brushed gold, sage lavender. Minimalist editorial composition with deliberate emptiness at center.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, distorted, plastic surfaces, oversaturated, AI-generated look, illustration, 3D render, CGI, person in frame, hand in frame, body parts

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits at the center of the composition, perfectly centered, front face up to the camera, oriented with its long side horizontal. The surrounding items frame it symmetrically with generous negative space around the box.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box at the exact center of the frame, oriented horizontally with its long side parallel to the lower edge of the frame, front face up to the camera, perfectly centered between the surrounding props with even negative space on all sides.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: No persona in frame — id_weight lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 to prevent PuLID from forcing any partial face or hand artifact into the empty center where the product will be composited in Step 2.
